name: mailvec
description: Local hybrid (FTS5 + vector) search over your Maildir email archive.
long_description: Mailvec exposes the local Mailvec archive (built by the indexer/embedder background services) over MCP. Provides search_emails (keyword, semantic, or hybrid), get_email, get_thread, and list_folders against a SQLite database with sqlite-vec embeddings. The bundled binary is the read-side stdio server only; the indexer and embedder are run separately as your own services.

maildir_root.title: Maildir root
maildir_root.description: The directory mbsync writes mail into (e.g. ~/Mail/Fastmail). Read-only — Mailvec never writes here.

database_path.title: Database path
database_path.description: Path to the Mailvec SQLite archive. Will be created on first run if it doesn't exist.

ollama_base_url.title: Ollama endpoint
ollama_base_url.description: Where the Ollama server is reachable. Used to embed search queries for semantic and hybrid search.

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search the archive by keyword, semantic similarity, or hybrid RRF fusion. Supports folder, date, and sender filters.

tools.name: get_email
tools.description: Fetch a single message by its message_id header or internal id.

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Fetch all messages in a thread given any message in the thread.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List Maildir folders with message counts.
